title: Glassy Jelly Croatian Flaxseed Paella
description: A show-off dish from Croatia featuring flaxseed, namul-blanch-season, and a glassy jelly topping. This paleo-friendly paella is perfect for a special occasion.
instructions: Heat the ghee in a large paella pan over medium heat.
Add the chopped red onion and cook until translucent, about 3 minutes.
Add the sliced red bell pepper and cook until tender, about 4 minutes.
Add the chicken breast and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the namul-blanch-season and stir to combine.
Add the flaxseed and stir-fry for 2 minutes.
Add the chicken broth and bring to a simmer.
Reduce heat to low and cook for 15 minutes, until the liquid has been absorbed and the flaxseed is tender.
Meanwhile, prepare the glassy jelly topping by dissolving 1 cup of honey in 1 cup of water over low heat.
Simmer the jelly mixture for 10 minutes, or until it reaches 230°F on a candy thermometer.
Remove from heat and let cool slightly.
Pour the jelly mixture over the cooked paella and serve hot.
